title: mesosphaerum lanatum
intro: Mesosphaerum lanatum, also known as Woolly Mint or Woolly Horned Mint, is a perennial herb native to tropical Africa and Asia, characterized by its hairy leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective against a range of health issues. The medicinal properties of Mesosphaerum lanatum have been associated with various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
